code_items.intent: Implemented a complete Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) class with forward propagation, backpropagation through time (BPTT), and training functionality for character-level sequence prediction, including one-hot encoding, Tanh/Softmax activation functions, and gradient descent optimization.

Implemented a complete Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) class with forward propagation, backpropagation through time (BPTT), and training functionality for character-level sequence prediction, including one-hot encoding, Tanh/Softmax activation functions, and gradient descent optimization.

Implemented a complete Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) class with forward propagation, backpropagation through time (BPTT), and training functionality for character-level sequence prediction, including one-hot encoding, Tanh/Softmax activation functions, and gradient descent optimization.
Added re-export of the new "./rnn" module to expose its functionality through the package's public API.

Added an `argMax` method to the Matrix class that returns the index of the maximum value in a specified row. & Refine the matrix initialization logic to explicitly check if the fill value `f` is a number before using it, falling back to random values otherwise.

Extracted the output validation logic from `checkSample` into a separate `checkOutput` method, and reorganized `checkSample` to call both `checkInput` and `checkOutput` independently, improving code modularity and reusability. & Refactored the prediction logic by extracting a new `predictNet` method that returns the full forward propagation results (including input), and renamed `calcDerivativeMultiple` to `backPropagationMultiple` for clearer naming. & Renamed `calcnet` to `forwardPropagation` and `calcDerivativeMultiple` to `backPropagationMultiple` to improve code clarity and align method names with standard neural network terminology. & Renamed methods `calcnet` and `calcDerivativeMultiple` to `forwardPropagation` and `backPropagationMultiple` respectively, to improve code clarity and align with standard neural network terminology. & Renamed the method `calcDerivative` to `backPropagation` to better reflect its functional role in the neural network training process. & Renamed the method `calcDerivative` to `backPropagation` to better reflect its role in the backpropagation algorithm, while preserving all functionality. & Renamed the method `calcnet` to `forwardPropagation` to improve code clarity and align with standard neural network terminology. & Renamed the neural network computation methods from `calcnet` and `calcDerivative` to `forwardPropagation` and `backPropagation` respectively, to improve code readability and align with standard machine learning terminology.

dependent_code_blocks: import type { ActivationFunction, TrainingOptions, Mode, BPNetOptions, NetShape, BackPropagationResult } from "./types";
code_items.intent:
Removed the entire `Optimize` class definition and its export, effectively deleting the module's functionality.

Removed the entire `Optimize` class implementation, including the `crossCost` method and stub methods for `momentum`, `adaGrad`, and `adaDelta`, effectively deleting the optimization module.
